description: Displays the status of a running gateway instance. A gateway instance is a running process that has registered itself with the platform using a gateway token. One gateway can have multiple instances running on different hosts.

ID.description: ID is the identifier of the object.
ID.title: ID

config.description: The configuration that the gateway was started with. The format of the config is version specific and subject to change.
config.title: config

currentVersion.description: The current version of the gateway.
currentVersion.title: currentVersion

diagnostics.description: List of diagnostics for this instance.
diagnostics.title: diagnostics

healthy.description: True if the gateway instance is considered healthy.
healthy.title: healthy

hostname.description: The name of the host where the gateway is running.
hostname.title: hostname

parentID.description: The ID of the parent resource.
parentID.title: parentID

ping.description: The last ping recorded for the gateway instance.
ping.title: ping

start.description: The start time for the gateway instance.
start.title: start

status.description: The status of the gateway instance.
status.title: status

tokenID.description: The ID of the gateway token this gw instance authenticated with.
tokenID.title: tokenID

title: GatewayInstance
